author: Pixar YouTube
text:
Hoppers: One Shot, Many Artists | 'Single Shot' Progression for Bear Attack (Hoppers now on Disney+)
Watch as Pixar artists carefully craft a single shot of animation for the original film, HOPPERS. Now streaming on ‪‪@disneyplus! See more behind the scenes material, original short films, and filmmaker interviews on THE PIXAR SHOW, now on Pixar's YouTube page! 

#animation #pixar #disney #disneyplus #hoppers #film #movies #bts #behindthescenes 

Chapters: 
00:00 - Intro
00:24 - Story
03:20 - Art 
05:48 - Sets (Environments) 
09:00 - Camera & Staging (Layout) 
11:13 - Animation 
12:50 - Character Simulation 
15:39 - Effects (Water) 
18:21 - Effects (Vegetation) 
21:00 - Lighting & Compositing 
23:58 - Rendering (Lightspeed) 
25:51 - Editorial 28:09 - End Credits
